q: Your vaccination team asks for storage temperature for oral polio vaccine. What was your answer in degrees Celsius?
e: SUHU PENYIMPANAN VAKSIN (Cold Chain): OPV (Oral Polio Vaccine) dapat disimpan -15 sampai -25 derajat Celsius untuk jangk

q: A 10 days old baby came with icteric. Normal delivery BBL 3100 gram. Given breastmilk right after birth and weight significantly increased. Most possible diagnosis?
e: BREASTMILK JAUNDICE (Ikterus ASI): ikterus yang muncul/menetap setelah hari ke 5-7 pada bayi ASI eksklusif.

q: A mother just gave birth to a baby with congenital heart defect. Which test do you suggest the mother to take?
e: RUBELLA: infeksi maternal rubella pada trimester pertama menyebabkan Congenital Rubella Syndrome (CRS) yang ditandai KAT

q: Cardiac syncope may lead to high mortality of approximately 10%. What is the red flag of syncope in children?
e: QT SYNDROME (Long QT Syndrome/LQTS): RED FLAG sinkop kardiak yang mengancam jiwa.

q: A pregnant mother tested HIV positive. She asked if she can breastfeed the baby. You advised nutritional selection to prevent HIV vertical transmission. It should be?
e: AFASS adalah kriteria WHO untuk pemilihan nutrisi bayi dari ibu HIV positif: A = Affordable (terjangkau), F = Feasible (

q: A 5 years old girl was brought due to pale, Hb 7.0 gr/dL, SI 20 mg/dL, TIBC 456 mg/dL. What is the recommended dose of iron?
e: TERAPI ANEMIA DEFISIENSI BESI (ADB): DOSIS TERAPEUTIK = 4-6 mg/kgBB/hari elemental iron, dibagi 3 dosis, diminum 30 meni

q: Why do infants need iron supplementation?
options: In breastfed baby, milk contains low iron
Baby growth increases rapidly and iron reserve depletes rapidly
In the first 4 months, iron supplementation is needed most
In breastfed baby, iron content reduces over time
In breastfed baby, milk production gets lower
e: Alasan UTAMA bayi memerlukan suplementasi besi: PERTUMBUHAN PESAT + DEPLESI CADANGAN CEPAT.

q: Denver II interpretation for NORMAL is?
options: Delay occurs only in more than one domain
No delay in any domain and only one caution
Delay occurs in no more than two cautions
e: Interpretasi Denver II: NORMAL = tidak ada delay DAN paling banyak 1 caution.

q: Why does the clinic provide you with the Denver II tool to work on children development?
e: Denver II adalah alat SKRINING perkembangan anak, BUKAN alat diagnosis.

q: Hyponatremia with sodium level 125 mEq/L. Which system is most vulnerable?
e: SISTEM SARAF PUSAT (CNS) paling rentan terhadap HIPONATREMIA.

q: A patient presents at ER with general seizure, normal breathing, and normal circulation. Classification according to Paediatric Assessment Triangle (PAT)?
e: Paediatric Assessment Triangle (PAT): 3 komponen: (1) APPEARANCE (tampilan/kesadaran): ABNORMAL karena ada kejang = gang

q: A 8 months old boy was brought due to pale. CBC: Hb 8, MCV 72, MCH 24, MCHC 29, PLT 295.000, Reticulocyte 0.31%, peripheral smear: microcytosis, hypochromia, cigar cell, poikilocytosis. Diagnosis?
e: ANEMIA DEFISIENSI BESI (ADB): (1) MCV 72 fL = MIKROSITIK (<80 fL); (2) MCH 24 pg = HIPOKROMIK (<27 pg);

q: A 5 years old girl brought to ER, sweating, restless and thin for 10 days. Raised pulse, exophthalmos, and dry skin on physical examination. Diagnosis?

q: A 16 years old girl has never got her period. What is your conclusion?

q: A 5 years old girl has developed large breast, but not followed by other signs of puberty. Diagnosis?

q: A 5 years old girl presented with redness almost all over the body and breathing difficulty after consuming lobster, no allergic history. Type of hypersensitivity?

q: A 6 years old girl was brought to ER with abdominal pain. Palpable red rash on both legs and buttocks. She is otherwise well. Diagnosis?
e: HSP (Henoch-Schonlein Purpura/IgA Vasculitis): TRIAS KLASIK = (1) PURPURA PALPABEL (teraba) di ekstremitas bawah dan bok

q: A 4 years old girl had dyspnea for 5 hours, low grade fever with barking cough for two days. Respiratory distress, inspiratory stridor, steeple sign on X-ray. Diagnosis?
e: CROUP (Laryngotracheobronchitis Akut): (1) Batuk MENGGONGGONG (barking/seal cough);

q: What are the contraindications for breastfeeding?
options: Mother with TB on OAT for 1 week
e: KONTRAINDIKASI MENYUSUI (WHO): (1) Ibu HIV positif (jika AFASS terpenuhi); (2) Ibu dengan HTLV tipe I/II;

q: A 4 year old boy, 20 kg, comes to ER unconscious with fast breathing but no retractions, soft pulse 180 bpm, cold extremities, CRT 4 seconds, BP 50/30 mmHg, high fever 5 days. Emergency assessment?

q: A 10-year old boy with altered consciousness. 2 weeks earlier jaundice, fever, and abdominal pain. After a few days treatment, boy became more toxic. Liver is small, hepatic enzyme decreased with elevated bilirubin direct and indirect. Diagnosis?
e: FULMINANT HEPATIC FAILURE (Gagal Hati Fulminan): klue = (1) Riwayat hepatitis akut (demam + ikterus + nyeri perut);

q: A full term neonate noticed to have heart murmur at 1 day of age (systolic 2/6 grade). On day 3, murmur transformed into a continuous murmur first heard on upper left sternal border. Newborn well, SpO2 100%. Likely cause?
e: PDA PADA BAYI CUKUP BULAN: Hari 1 = bising sistolik (pirau L ke R hanya saat sistol karena resistensi pulmonal masih tin

q: A 4-year old was brought with fever and vomiting for 3 days, no cough/runny nose, only positive Rumple Leed test. Lab: Hb 13, Hct 43%, WBC 5500, PLT 132.000. Diagnosis?
e: DENGUE PROBABLE (Probable Dengue): belum ada konfirmasi serologis/virologis (NS1, IgM, IgG dengue negatif atau belum dip

q: 10-year old boy has fever, malaise. Drinking lemon causes pain in the gland in his neck. He failed to get vaccinated for?
e: PAROTITIS EPIDEMIKA (MUMPS): nyeri di kelenjar parotis diprovokasi oleh makanan asam/lemon (stimulasi produksi saliva me

q: A 5 years old child was bitten by a dog suspected of rabies, open wound 1 cm on the big toe. What is the first action?
options: Rinse with flowing water and detergent for 10-15 minutes
e: PENANGANAN GIGITAN HEWAN TERSANGKA RABIES - LANGKAH PERTAMA: CUCI LUKA dengan air mengalir + sabun/deterjen selama MINIM

q: A 12 months old baby presented with diffuse pink maculopapular rash all over his body. He is otherwise well, but had fever for 3 days which resolved the day before the rash appeared. Most likely diagnosis?
e: EXANTHEM SUBITUM (Roseola Infantum/Sixth Disease): CIRI KHAS = demam tinggi 3-5 hari (anak relatif baik) lalu DEMAM TURU

q: A 10 year old girl suddenly cannot walk and cannot control urination/defecation. One week before: paralysis, high fever for 3 days with cough and colds that resolved without treatment. Diagnosis?
e: POLIOMIELITIS: paralisis flasid akut + riwayat infeksi virus sebelumnya (demam + batuk + pilek = fase prodromal poliovir

q: A 11-month old premature baby brought with pale, Hb 8, MCH 24, MCHC 29, PLT 295.000, reticulocyte 0.31%, peripheral smear: microcytosis, hypochromia, cigar cell, poikilocytosis. What do you plan to give?
e: TERAPI BESI (Iron therapy): diagnosis = ADB.

q: When blood vessel injury occurs, normal hemostasis may activate?
options: Vasoconstriction, platelet activation, coagulation cascade activation
Vasodilation, platelet activation, coagulation cascade activation
Vasoconstriction, platelet deactivation, coagulation cascade activation
Vasodilation, platelet deactivation, coagulation cascade deactivation
Vasoconstriction, platelet activation, coagulation cascade deactivation
e: HEMOSTASIS NORMAL: 3 komponen berurutan setelah cedera pembuluh darah: (1) VASOKONSTRIKSI (reflex vasoconstriction): res

q: A 6 years old girl with blank stare since 6 months. When stunned, she does not respond to calls. After the attack she returns to normal activities. EEG: generalized slow spike wave 2-3 Hz. Diagnosis?
e: CHILDHOOD ABSENCE EPILEPSY (CAE): (1) Usia puncak 4-8 tahun;

q: An 8-year-old girl injured her knee. Thirty minutes after 200 mg Ibuprofen, she develops diffuse hives and swelling of lips and eyelids, and difficulty breathing. Diagnosis?
e: ANAFILAKSIS: reaksi alergi sistemik berat yang mengancam jiwa.

q: A 4-year old girl had high fever for 3 days, colicky abdominal pain and bloody diarrhea, 9 bowel movements/day with nausea and vomiting, sunken eyes. Stool: mucus, blood and leucocytes. Diagnosis?
e: SHIGELLOSIS (Disentri Basiler): diare BERDARAH + berlendir + leukosit di feses (tanda INFLAMASI KOLON) + kolik abdomen +

q: Blood electrolyte of a 4 years old patient showed potassium level 6.5 mEq/L. What is the possible ECG finding?
e: HIPERKALEMIA (K+ 6.5 mEq/L) - perubahan EKG sesuai tingkat keparahan: K+ 5.5-6.5 mEq/L = PEAKED T WAVE (gelombang T ting

q: At newborn screening, TSH value was 60 mU/L. What is your next step?
e: SKRINING HIPOTIROID NEONATAL - TSH 60 mU/L (tinggi, Normal <10-20 mU/L): LANGKAH SELANJUTNYA = UJI KONFIRMATORIS.

q: A girl, 6 years old, short stature (height-for-age z score -3SD). Physical examination: webbed neck, cubitus valgus, and wide-spaced nipples. Diagnosis?
e: SINDROM TURNER (45,X): kariotipe 45,X (monosomi X) - perempuan.

q: A 6 years old girl with tremor for 10 days, sweating, restless and thin. Pulse 112x/minute, exophthalmia and dry skin. Diagnosis?
e: HIPERTIROID (Graves Disease): TREMOR + EKSOFTALMUS (proptosis = tanda SPESIFIK Graves ophthalmopathy) + TAKIKARDI 112/me

q: A 9-year old girl admitted to ER with wheats almost all over her body and breathing difficulty after consuming lobsters. What is the possible type of hypersensitivity?
e: HIPERSENSITIVITAS TIPE 1 (IgE-mediated): sama dengan kasus lobster sebelumnya.

q: A 8 years old girl diagnosed with nephrotic syndrome. What are the possible clinical manifestations?
e: SINDROM NEFROTIK: PROTEINURIA MASIF (>40 mg/m2/jam atau >3.5 g/hari atau dipstick >=3+) adalah HALLMARK sindrom nefrotik

q: A four years old girl had sudden onset of dyspnea for 6 hours, low grade fever with barking cough for two days. Respiratory distress, suprasternal retraction, inspiratory stridor, X-ray steeple sign. Diagnosis?
e: CROUP: STEEPLE SIGN adalah tanda PATOGNOMONIK croup pada X-ray AP leher/dada.

q: Anak 5 tahun datang ke IGD, sadar, HR 210x/menit, dada tidak nyaman. TD 82/50, tidak ada tanda gagal jantung, ekstremitas hangat. EKG narrow QRS takikardi. Inisial intervensi?
e: SVT (Supraventricular Tachycardia) dengan HEMODINAMIK STABIL: HR 210 + narrow QRS + ekstremitas hangat + tidak ada gagal

q: Anak tidak sadar, GCS 6. Tidak bisa patensi airway karena tone muscle lemah. Tatalaksana?
e: OPA (Oropharyngeal Airway/Gudel Airway): pada anak tidak sadar dengan HIPOTONIA (tonus otot lemah) menyebabkan lidah jat

q: Anak tidak sadar. EKG wide QRS. Tatalaksana?
e: ANAK TIDAK SADAR + EKG WIDE QRS = CARDIAC ARREST dengan SHOCKABLE RHYTHM (VF atau Pulseless VT).

q: Anak hemodinamik stabil. EKG wide QRS. Tatalaksana?
e: ANAK HEMODINAMIK STABIL + WIDE QRS = VT (Ventricular Tachycardia) STABIL.

q: Anak tidak sadar, tidak ada pulse, tidak ada napas, tidak respons. Apa yang dilihat sebagai inisial untuk memastikan diagnosis cardiac arrest?
options: Pengembangan dada tidak adekuat saat ventilasi
SpO2 di pulse oksimetri tidak terdeteksi
e: KONFIRMASI CARDIAC ARREST secara KLINIS: tanda UTAMA = TIDAK ADA NADI + TIDAK ADA NAPAS NORMAL (atau gasping).

q: Anak tidak sadar, pada monitor defib muncul irama tidak teridentifikasi gelombang P ataupun QRS, pasien tidak ada nadi. Diagnosis?
e: IRAMA TANPA GELOMBANG P DAN QRS YANG TERIDENTIFIKASI + TIDAK ADA NADI = VENTRICULAR FIBRILLATION (VF).

q: 16 year old with hives after dinner consuming seafood and mango juice, itchy all over body. What mechanism does this happen through?
e: REAKSI ALERGI TIPE 1 - IgE-MEDIATED HISTAMINE RELEASE dari SEL MAST.

q: 6 month baby, after consuming formula milk, suddenly difficult breathing and sucking from bottle. No allergy history but same symptoms before. Parents have allergy to shrimp. What is assessment?
e: ALERGI SUSU SAPI: bayi 6 bulan + sesak napas + kesulitan menyedot botol SETELAH minum susu formula + gejala REKUREN (sam

q: 10 bulan, riwayat kejang 30 menit di rumah, setelah kejang tidak sadar, di UGD kejang lagi 15 menit. Tatalaksana di UGD?
options: Stesolid rektal 2x, lanjut IV fenitoin jika kejang
IV fenitoin, lanjut IV fenobarbital jika kejang
IV diazepam, lanjut IV fenobarbital, lanjut IV fenitoin
e: STATUS EPILEPTIKUS (SE) - ALGORITMA TATALAKSANA: Total durasi kejang >30 menit + masih berlanjut di UGD = STATUS EPILEPT

q: Anak sekolah sering tidur di kelas, nilai menurun, saat bercerita tampak tidak nyambung. Tatalaksana?
e: KLUE KUAT ABSENCE SEIZURE: sering melamun/tidak responsif di kelas + nilai turun + tidak nyambung saat bicara (episode b

q: A male infant 2.4 kg delivered by C-section at 36 weeks gestational age. Tachypnea, subcostal retractions, nasal flaring, RR 70. CXR: air bronchogram, USG: comet tail artifact. Diagnosis?
